name: GitHub, Streak
description: Current contribution streak as a hero number. Background colour shifts at the 7, 30, and 100 day thresholds so a long streak reads at a glance. Adds longest-streak and today's contribution count below. Token required (uses the contributionCalendar GraphQL endpoint).

cell_options.name: user
cell_options.label: GitHub username (blank uses the default from GitHub Core)
